name: Chocolate Chip Beer and Sour Cream Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter and sugar until fluffy.
2. Add eggs one at a time, blending well after each addition.
3. Blend in vanilla and sour cream until creamy.
4. Gradually add flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt to the batter; stir until just combined.
5. Mix nuts, chips, sugar, and cinnamon in a small bowl.
6. Pour the flour mixture into a greased and floured tube pan.
7. Alternate layers with the nut and chip mixture or combine them with the flour mixture before pouring into the pan.
8. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 50-60 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted comes out clean.
9. Allow the cake to cool in the pan for about 10 minutes before transferring it to a rack to cool completely.
